negative_prompt: The video captures a series of frames showing ugly scenes, static with no motion, motion blur, over-saturation, shaky footage, low resolution, grainy texture, pixelated images, poorly lit areas, underexposed and overexposed scenes, poor color balance, washed out colors, choppy sequences, jerky movements, low frame rate, artifacting, color banding, unnatural transitions, outdated special effects, fake elements, unconvincing visuals, poorly edited content, jump cuts, visual noise, and flickering. name: av_d5eb364d-0d7e-4295-a1c1-972080c7d8fe
prompt: The video opens with a view from inside a vehicle, likely captured by a dashboard camera, showcasing a suburban street scene during late afternoon or early evening under a clear, soft blue sky. The foreground features the hood of the car, which reflects the surroundings. On the left side of the street, several parked cars, including a red sedan and a dark SUV, are visible. Across the street, a white house with a dark roof and a garage is situated, partially obscured by trees and bushes. A small pink and white trailer is parked near the house, and a person can be seen walking along the sidewalk on the right side of the frame. As the video progresses, the camera remains stationary, capturing the same scene without any noticeable changes in the positions of the objects or the person walking. The person continues their movement, gradually moving further away from the camera's perspective. The pink and white trailer remains stationary, and the parked cars and house stay in their original positions. The scene maintains a tranquil and unchanging environment, with no significant actions or new objects introduced. By the end of the video, the scene remains consistent with the initial frame, depicting a peaceful suburban street with no notable changes.
